## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution

How would this feature work? Describe the expected behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional Context

Add any references, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
